case_title: PANFILO ARMAS ET AL VS. DITSON LENIN GARCIA

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO NOV-06-2019 AT 8:30 A.M. DEPT. 506.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-06-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PANFILO ARMAS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EUGENE LEE DBA WESTERN GRAVEL & ROOFING SUPPLY. DEFENDANT DITSON LENIN GARCIA IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARMAS, PANFILO AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DITSON LENIN DBA GOLDEN GATE SOLAR
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $210.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $620.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DITSON LENIN DBA GOLDEN GATE SOLAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JAN-02-2020

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ARMAS, PANFILO EUGENE LEE DBA WESTERN GRAVEL & ROOFING SUPPLY AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DITSON LENIN DBA GOLDEN GATE SOLAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF PANFILO ARMAS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EUGENE LEE DBA GRAVEL & ROOFING CO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PANFILO ARMAS EMPLOYEE. DEFENDANT DITSON LENIN GARCIA DBA AS GOLDN GATE SOLAR IS PRESENT. NO PROOF SERVICE FILED (THE LAST P.O.S. WAS DEFECTIVE) THE DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$150.00) SERVED AUG-06-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DITSON LENIN DBA GOLDEN GATE SOLAR

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PLAINTIFF PAFILO ARMAS DBA WESTERN GRAVEL APPEARED - GRANTED BY JUDGE ROBERTSON II FILED BY PLAINTIFF EUGENE LEE DBA WESTERN GRAVEL & ROOFING SUPPLY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARMAS, PANFILO EUGENE LEE DBA WESTERN GRAVEL & ROOFING SUPPLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, DITSON LENIN DBA GOLDEN GATE SOLAR $630.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $830.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF PANFILO ARMAS. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY EUGENE LEE DBA WESTERN GRAVEL $0. WESTERN GRAVEL WAS PAID PREVIOUSLY ON 8/26/19. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
